steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The phrase "but in fact" reverses the idea that Greco-Roman sculpture always idealizes human subjects. The blank needs a word that means people can be depicted in a less favorable way.

steps.title: Test the meanings
steps.content: Choice B means lacking depth, not opposite of idealized. Choice C means not exact. Choice D means hard to believe. The remaining word means unfavorable or not flattering, which fits the contrast. The answer is A.
